_comment: Scoring weights for the day-trading scanner. Updated automatically by learner/learner.py after each trading cycle. Do not edit by hand unless you know what you're doing — the learner will overwrite these.

blend._comment: How much weight to give AI (Ollama) score vs technical rule score in final ranking

technical._comment: Additive score adjustments for individual technical signals (+/- from baseline 5.0)
